text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to attend a seminar held by an instructor
from a prestigious Umamusume training school. In
front of the venue, I meet...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now here's a familiar face. Have you come to
listen to my mother's talk as well? Your
dedication is laudable.
choice_data_list:
Huh?! Your mother is the one leading this
seminar?!

Huh?! Your mother is the one leading this
seminar?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You came without knowing that? Absurd. My
mother has trained many superb Umamusume.
Know that every word she utters is replete with
wisdom!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Now, during this exercise, it's important for the
trainee to position themself like bam and
squeeze, then bring that oomph down low.
choice_data_list: (I, uh, can't follow this at all...)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I see. So you should activate your abdominal
muscles while keeping your back straight, then
shift the load into your glutes.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Just paying attention to those things is sure to
drastically improve the quality of training
exercises. That's my mother for you!
choice_data_list:
(How did she understand that jargon so
perfectly?!)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
When instructing children, you must grasp the
idiosyncrasies of how each of them run—oh,
please hold on! My nose is itching. Ahh... Ahh...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: AAACHOOO!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Simply magnificent!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She's so bold, sneezing at full force with no
reservations about what others may think! What
tenacious mental fortitude!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That is no doubt the secret behind my mother's
success in the grand races she ran. I must learn
from her example!
choice_data_list:
(The things she admires about her mother are...
strangely skewed.)

text_block_list.name: Event MC
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's watch footage from a famous race
during your career so we can look back on that
time—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, please wait a moment! Watching old footage
is all well and good, but what do you say we
reenact that race, right here and now?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It would be far more beneficial to witness the race
with your own eyes! Let's see... Air Groove! Could
you play the role of my rival, please? ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Y-you want me to stand in for your rival?! But I
haven't rehearsed or prepared anything...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You'll be fine! You've watched that Japanese
Oaks video countless times since you were a
child! Quickly, come up on stage!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: O-of course...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They even prepare a racecourse backdrop for the
stage, and the reenactment co-starring the
mother-daughter pair is brought to life.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: And now it becomes a fierce competition on the straight! Okay! Here my rival, number nine, appears from the outside! Come in like vwooosh!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: V-v-vwooosh!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
That cute expression won't cut it! You need to
glare at me with rage!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Y-you want me to glare at you, Mother?! Grrr...
H-how is this?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: No, that's all wrong! Sharpen your gaze and really scowl! Start again from the vwooosh part!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Um, f-from the vwooosh?!
choice_data_list:
(Poor Air Groove... She sure is having a rough
time of it...)

(Poor Air Groove... She sure is having a rough
time of it...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They have to redo parts of the race multiple
times, but the seminar hosted by Air Groove's
mother is eventually brought to a close.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Wheeze... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
M-Mother... I can't believe you dragged me on
stage without discussing anything in advance. I
almost...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's no surprise Air Groove feels so upset. Her
mother definitely went too fa—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I almost couldn't contain the admiration within
me!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't have asked for a better place to train
my mental strength! Thank you for bestowing me
such a valuable learning opportunity!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I must review today's events and really commit
the knowledge I gleaned into my head! If you'll
excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, she's far too serious about these
things. But I guess that's just like her...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
But with how air-headed I am, I suppose it's only
natural that my daughter would compensate by
being extra on top of things.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
...Well, no point dwelling on it. Maybe I should
take her out somewhere as an apology.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I learned a great deal about the
unconventional relationship between Air Groove
and her mother.
